---
title: "DL Compilers"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Compiler-oriented projects around graph capture, IR lowering, fusion,
scheduling, generated kernels, and deployment-oriented compilation.
</p>

<div class="project-stack">
  <!-- Add MLIR GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">MLIR</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">IR design, dialects, lowering passes, and code generation pipelines</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add XLA GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">XLA</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Graph compilation, HLO-style transformations, and accelerator execution</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add TVM GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">TVM</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Tensor program optimization, scheduling, autotuning, and lowering</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add torch.compile GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">torch.compile</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">TorchDynamo graph capture, Inductor codegen, graph breaks, and guard behavior</span>
  </a>
</div>
